## Safety Boundary

- [ ] This feature stays local-only.
- [ ] Demo activity targets only `localhost` or `127.0.0.1`.
- [ ] It does not require real credentials, real user data, or third-party systems.
- [ ] Vulnerable and secure behavior will be clearly separated where relevant.
